name: [PARENT-04/PARENT-05] Restore parent bridge child topic/session/recap route entry surfaces
description: Mentor-audit bridge/backstack Chrome checks failed to render expected child topic, session, and recap entry surfaces from parent bridge routes.
acceptanceCriteria:
ROOT CAUSE (flag-on): parent bridge -> child routes call assertOwnerAndParentAccess -> assertParentAccess -> validateGuardianChargeRelationshipV2 -> isGuardianOf (family-access.ts:60-76; guardianship.ts:27-48), which reads `guardianship WHERE guardian_person_id=? AND charge_person_id=? AND revoked_at IS NULL` and returns false (-> ForbiddenError 403) when no active guardianship edge exists. Legacy path read family_links (always populated). The v2 gap: guardianship edges missing/incomplete (reseed not run, or a guardian-charge link created AFTER the reseed under a path that does not also write guardianship).
SURFACE: the child bridge routes (FAMILY_CHILD_ROUTES, e.g. child/[profileId]/session/[sessionId], .../recap/[recapId]) require familyShape (navigation-contract.ts:181,395) = MODE_NAV_V1_ENABLED=true. In V0 (prod nav today) the routes are unreachable -> silent nav redirect, NOT a visible error. The visible defect is V1-only -> AFTER-P5.
VARIANTS: (1) guardian WITHOUT a guardianship edge to the child -> 403 today; (2) guardian WITH a valid guardianship edge -> must reach child topic/session/recap surfaces, preserve provenance/return target, back-nav returns to the originating family surface.
OPEN VERIFICATION (execution-time): confirm whether NEW guardian-charge links created post-reseed write the guardianship edge (the forward gap) vs only the one-time backfill. Live-repro on V1 + flag-on.
DONE: under flag-on + V1, a guardian with a valid guardianship edge opens child topic/session/recap entry screens, provenance + back-nav correct; browser bridge-backstack coverage passes. REGRESSION TEST: apps/api/src/services/family-access.test.ts (real DB) — a guardian with a guardianship edge gets 200 on GET /dashboard/children/:childId/sessions/:sessionId; without the edge, 403

.
riskImpact: Parent bridge to child topic/session/recap surfaces is broken under flag-on + V1-nav; guardian drilldown/provenance unusable. V1-only surface -> after-P5 (not reachable in V0 prod today).
